dialogue.bot: Welcome to the future! I am your AI assistant. Now, imagine you are the principal of Hong Van Thu High School. What rule would you make about bringing food into the classroom?
dialogue.expected: I would make a rule that students are not allowed to bring food into the classroom to keep it clean and focused.

dialogue.bot: That's a bold move! Next, what rule would you make about school uniforms?
dialogue.expected: I would require all students to wear uniforms every day so that everyone looks equal and feels proud of their school.

dialogue.bot: Interesting. Now, how would you reduce students' screen time in your school?
dialogue.expected: I would limit phone use to break times only and encourage students to read books or talk with friends instead.

dialogue.bot: I see. What is your rule about posting on social media during the lesson?
dialogue.expected: I would ban posting on social media during lessons because it distracts students from learning.

dialogue.bot: Final question, Principal: Should students be allowed to use tablets instead of notebooks?
dialogue.expected: I think students should be allowed to use tablets because they can access information faster, but they must use them responsibly.

dialogue.bot: Thank you, Principal! Your rules will make the school of the future amazing. 🏫🚀
